title: How To Change YouTube Profile Picture on iPhone or Android
description:
Here's how to change your YouTube profile picture from your phone in under a minute. This Short walks through the steps inside the YouTube app on iPhone and Android: open the app, tap your profile picture in the bottom right, go to View channel, hit the pencil edit icon, tap your current profile picture, then either take a new photo or pick one from your gallery and save. Give it a few minutes to update across all your devices.

TubeBuddy is the browser extension that helps you manage and optimize your YouTube channel - install free at https://bit.ly/TubeBuddyTrial0

#TubeBuddy
